title: Granules India Advisory Limited is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Granules India Advisory Limited is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Granules India Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Pimpri-Chinchwad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Granules India Advisory Limited:
Granules India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Granules India Advisory Limited!
